headline: Morgan Rogers
body: 🚨🔴⚪️ Arsenal are now set to accelerate on Morgan Rogers deal, top target as new winger as always mentioned. Talks already advanced on player side and separate case from Tzolis, AFC always wanted both. No talks for Barcola so far; focus on Rogers.
raw_text:
🚨🔴⚪️ Arsenal are now set to accelerate on Morgan Rogers deal, top target as new winger as always mentioned.

Talks already advanced on player side and separate case from Tzolis, #AFC always wanted both.

No talks for Barcola so far; focus on Rogers.
text:

No talks for Barcola so far; focus on Rogers.

👀 TRANSFER- MORGAN ROGERS LINKED WITH A PERMANENT TRANSFER FROM ASTON VILLA TO ARSENAL.
